evals.prompt: Prepare delivery pack for tuapse_19820613_133910 natal
Build forecast pack when only solar_arc is available (no progressions)
evals.expected_output: PACK_MANIFEST.yaml with INCOMPLETE status, missing_methods lists secondary_progressions

evals.prompt: Archive runs older than 30 days for tuapse_19820613_133910
evals.expected_output: Archive batch created, INDEX.yaml external paths rewritten, verification report generated

evals.prompt: Build pack when chart.yaml has invalid timezone format
evals.expected_output: BLOCKED status, reason: schema validation failed, errors listed
